words.hint: Mam dziś lekcję gry na pianinie.
words.answer: I have a piano lesson today.
I have been taking lessons for a year.
We're playing the C major scale today.
I'm practicing my left hand.
My teacher is very patient.
I was nervous at first.
Today I will play a new song.
I have homework to practice.
I play scales every day.
I'm practicing reading sheet music.
I still have trouble with rhythm.
The teacher shows me new chords.

words.hint: Czasem ćwiczę na keyboardzie w domu.
words.answer: Sometimes I practice on the keyboard at home.
I want to play faster.
I'm learning to accompany songs.

words.hint: Po lekcji jestem zmotywowany do ćwiczeń.
words.answer: After the lesson, I'm motivated to practice.
We chose a classical piece for today.
I like playing pieces from movies.
We play a simple melody at the beginning.
The teacher corrects my posture.
I have to use a metronome.

words.hint: Nie zawsze trafiam we właściwe klawisze.
words.answer: I don't always hit the right keys.

words.hint: Gram dzisiaj na fortepianie w szkole muzycznej.
words.answer: I'm playing the piano at the music school today.

words.hint: Staram się nie patrzeć na ręce.
words.answer: I try not to look at my hands.

words.hint: Uczę się nut po angielsku i po polsku.
words.answer: I'm learning notes in English and Polish.
We have a short warm-up at the start.
Sometimes I improvise.
We start by reviewing the previous material.
We practice together with the teacher.
I like the sound of the piano.
I'd like to play my favorite song.
The teacher shows me new techniques.
Sometimes I play with both hands at the same time.
I'm learning to play by ear.
After the lesson, we talk about my progress.
I asked questions about difficult parts.
We also practice minor scales.
Practice requires patience.

words.hint: Uczę się czytać akordy na pięciolinii.
words.answer: I'm learning to read chords on the staff.
I got a new sheet music notebook.
I like practicing after the lesson.
I rely on my teacher's guidance.

words.hint: Czasem mam tremę przed zagraniem utworu.
words.answer: Sometimes I feel stage fright before playing a piece.
I'm learning new musical terms.
We improve the tempo of the piece.

words.hint: Gram fragmenty wielokrotnie, by je zapamiętać.
words.answer: I play passages many times to remember them.

words.hint: Lepiej mi idzie gra prawą ręką.
words.answer: I do better with my right hand.

words.hint: Uczę się grać cicho i głośno.
words.answer: I'm learning to play quietly and loudly.
Sometimes I forget the notes.
I adjust the bench before playing.

words.hint: Gram też proste ćwiczenia rozciągające palce.
words.answer: I also practice simple finger stretching exercises.
We recorded the lesson on the phone.
I often take breaks while practicing.
Today I will play a new chord.
The teacher explains differences between notes.
I'm practicing fingering runs.

words.hint: Zadanie domowe na następną lekcję już mam.
words.answer: I already have the homework for the next lesson.

words.hint: Pytam nauczyciela o wskazówki do ćwiczeń w domu.
words.answer: I ask the teacher for tips on practicing at home.
We practice transitions between chords.
I record my practice on a recorder.

words.hint: Starannie czytam nuty, by nie popełnić błędów.
words.answer: I carefully read the notes to avoid mistakes.

words.hint: Oglądam filmy instruktażowe o grze na pianinie.
words.answer: I watch instructional videos about playing the piano.
I am happy with every bit of progress.
The lesson lasts forty-five minutes.

words.hint: Spotykam się z nauczycielem raz w tygodniu.
words.answer: I meet with the teacher once a week.

words.hint: Mam tablice z nutami na ścianie.
words.answer: I have a sheet music chart on the wall.

words.hint: Po lekcji ćwiczę w domu na własnym pianinie.
words.answer: After the lesson, I practice at home on my own piano.
I try to play without mistakes.
I received positive feedback from the teacher.
I practice fingering as instructed.

words.hint: Zaczynam nowy utwór na kolejną lekcję.
words.answer: I'm starting a new piece for the next lesson.
